ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., Premier League) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2016/2017) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that came second in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Chelsea) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the team in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team in the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team in the season */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the season */,
  "goals_scored_in_home_matches" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in home matches */,
  "goals_scored_in_away_matches" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in away matches */,
  "goals_conceded_in_home_matches" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in home matches */,
  "goals_conceded_in_away_matches" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in away matches */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (matches without conceding a goal) */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the team */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team in the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular, playoff, friendly) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "home_team_score_halftime" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at halftime */,
  "away_team_score_halftime" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at halftime */,
  "home_team_score_fulltime" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at fulltime */,
  "away_team_score_fulltime" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at fulltime */,
  "match_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the match report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Number of appearances made by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (if a goalkeeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "stadium_website" TEXT /* Official website of the stadium */,
  "stadium_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the stadium's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the referee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "referee_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the referee's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
